message: The end of summer.
Even then, the sun still blazed high in the sky.
Cumulonimbi still floated high in the blue sky.
Those clouds no doubt rained down on a parched field out there.
The end of the season.
The same day that Dad died had come again.
A year later, it was still a sad day.
We had a lot of fun times, but Hasaki still cried on the night before the anniversary of his death.
It'd been a long time since Hasaki had cried. Maybe it'd been a whole year.
One year since that day.
I kept thinking about that day.
Then something happened to destroy it all.
On the anniversary of his death, that woman appeared, even though she hadn't come to the funeral.
Takuji and our mother had come to Sawai.

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you here?"
She just looked at me.
Takuji stood in front of her.

name: Takuji
message: "You still don't know how to talk to your mother, do you, Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmph. I don't think of her as my mother."

name: Hasaki
message: "T-Tomo Nii-san."

name: Takuji
message: "Hasaki... Long time no see, hehehe."

name: Hasaki
message: "Eek!"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's just creepy when you laugh. Look, you're scaring Hasaki."

name: Takuji
message: "Don't call me creepy. That's rude. I was smiling because I hadn't seen my little sister in so long."

name: Tomosane
message: "Smiling? That's a pretty nasty smile you got there."

name: Takuji
message: "Rude as ever, aren't we?"

name: Kotomi
message: "Where is my mother?"

name: Tomosane
message: "If you're looking for Grandma, she's in the house."

name: Kotomi
message: "All right. Takuji, let's go."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are those bastards in Sawaimura?"

name: Hasaki
message: "For Dad's first anniversary maybe?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The first anniversary of a funeral they didn't even come to?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah. I don't really understand why they're here..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji hasn't changed a bit."

name: Hasaki
message: "Takuji Nii-san always listens to Mom."

name: Tomosane
message: "That motherfucker!"
"I guess that makes you a sisterfucker, doesn't it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What'd you say?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee."

name: Yuki
message: "Was that your little brother just now?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, Hasaki's twin brother."

name: Yuki
message: "Twins, huh? Wow."

name: Tomosane
message: "He's the kind of scum that'd hit his sister."

name: Yuki
message: "Hit her? Don't all siblings fight sometimes?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki doesn't do anything to him. It's just him being mean to her."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm, I see."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, Hasaki-chan, you really like that doll, don't you? I always see you carrying it around."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah..."
Hasaki hugged the rabbit doll to her chest.
It took me and Yuki-nee three seasons to make that rabbit.
It wasn't quite as good as the rabbit in the store window, but Hasaki was quite enamored with her doll nonetheless.

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm, do you have the twin rabbits you got from Hasaki-chan, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "They're in my room."

name: Yuki
message: "You should attach them to your phone or something, dumbass! Don't let them out of your sight!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I-I'm a guy! I can't walk around with something like that!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-You don't like them?"

name: Yuki
message: "You duummmmy!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ow! Hey, don't hit me, stupid!"

name: Yuki
message: "You're the stupid one!"

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez, don't talk about Hasaki-chan's precious gift like that."

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess, but still, I can't put a rabbit doll on my phone."

name: Yuki
message: "Shut up! Don't let it out of your sight, you hear me?! You're so stupid!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ugh... Okay, fine."

name: Yuki
message: "So how is your doll doing?"

name: Hasaki
message: "It ripped a couple times, but Tomo Nii-san fixed it for me."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, wow..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It took us so many tries that I learned how to sew up little things like that."

name: Yuki
message: "You're good at all sorts of stuff, aren't you?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, and he does well in school too. Tomo Nii-san gets good grades, and he's amazing at sports."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, my grades are... Well, let's just say the bar is set pretty low in this village."

name: Yuki
message: "But I heard your grades were good in Tokyo too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, I did study because I didn't want to lose to that jerk Takuji."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha... You really don't like your little brother."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's more than that. I can't let him beat me at anything."

name: Hasaki
message: "I heard Takuji Nii-san got really amazing grades at school after you left."

name: Hasaki
message: "I heard his test scores were some of the best in the country."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Seriously?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa, now you're the one who's losing."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Who cares about that?! Being a man is about more than just getting good grades!"

name: Yuki
message: "Then what is it about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Men should be able to fight."

name: Yuki
message: "Are you an idiot?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Anyway, if Takuji comes, make sure you yell for me right away."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, okay."

name: Tomosane
message: "Who knows what he's up to..."
Yuki-nee's expression was conflicted.
She probably wanted to say that siblings should get along.
But Yuki-nee also understood that our family situation wasn't quite that simple.
So she looked troubled, but she couldn't say anything.
"Oh, if it isn't you, Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you two here for?"

name: Takuji
message: "What are we here for? Naturally, we're here for the anniversary of my beloved father's death."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you babbling about? You guys didn't even come to his funeral."

name: Takuji
message: "That's because Mother was much too bereaved to come. She loved Father very dearly, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "Loved him? Are you stupid? If she loved him, why did she betray him?!"

name: Takuji
message: Mother betrayed Father? That's only the fact that Hasaki and I were born.
Don't you understand that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because Hasaki and I aren't Mamiya children. Half is Mother's blood, and the other half is from the pastor of the White Lotus Association."

name: Takuji
message: "Even a child like me can understand what that means. The stork didn't bring us, and we weren't found in the vegetable patch."

name: Takuji
message: "Cause and effect... You would call the cause a betrayal, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "But if you call that a betrayal, then what of me and Hasaki, the children that were born as the effect?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're just spouting nonsense!"

name: Takuji
message: "It's not nonsense. It's merely reality."

name: Takuji
message: "If you want to call Mother a traitor, then you should call Hasaki the same thing."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why would I do that?! Hasaki didn't do anything wrong! Who would call her a traitor?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No one would say that! I won't let you say that. I'll never let you."

name: Takuji
message: "As usual, you're not being logical. I just can't understand you."

name: Takuji
message: "If Mother is a traitor, then Hasaki and I are both the result of treachery, the symbol of an ethically problematic birth out of wedlock. Isn't that the logical conclusion here?"
What a creepy guy. He was always like this, but he's gotten even worse with age.
He keeps using words I've never heard before.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki isn't the symbol of treachery. You always distort the situation and force your own interpretation on things."

name: Tomosane
message: "That woman who betrayed Dad and slept with another man is a traitor. That alone is the truth."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not Hasaki's fault. There's no way any of that is Hasaki's fault. No matter what you say, Hasaki isn't the one who sinned!"

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... Why do you want to protect Hasaki so much?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Because she's my little sister, obviously!"

name: Takuji
message: "Even though she has the blood of a traitor and an adulterer."

name: Tomosane
message: "Her blood doesn't matter. Who cares about a traitor's blood! An adulterer's blood? Are you stupid? Hasaki is my little sister, and that's all there is to it!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... I thought you were a bit smarter than that. That argument doesn't hold water."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't feel like having any argument with someone like you to begin with."

name: Takuji
message: "Why's that? If Hasaki is your little sister, then I'm your little brother, aren't I?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right. There was a time when I thought I could believe that, but I refuse to recognize a brother that would hope for Hasaki's death."

name: Takuji
message: "That again? When did I hope for Hasaki's death?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You always have!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You both wanted Hasaki to disappear. You thought it would be perfect if Hasaki would just disappear from this world."

name: Tomosane
message: "I've heard you both say that more times than I can count."

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... That's a misunderstanding."

name: Tomosane
message: "That wasn't a misunderstanding at all. You guys still believe in that silly prophecy, don't you?"

name: Takuji
message: "Silly, is it? You must be talking about the White Lotus Association pastor's prophecy, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, you and that woman still believe in it. That's why you hate Hasaki."

name: Takuji
message: "Hahaha... That's not true. I don't hate Hasaki at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't play dumb, Takuji."

name: Takuji
message: "All right, all right. I'll admit that in the past I occasionally had some thoughts like that."

name: Takuji
message: "That doesn't mean that I still hate Hasaki. To me, Hasaki is a precious little sister."

name: Tomosane
message: "Precious? The only precious thing to you is the savior's blood heritage, isn't it?"

name: Takuji
message: "The White Lotus Association's prophecy... Do you really think we still believe in that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's exactly what I think."

name: Takuji
message: "That's all in the past. Mother has already withdrawn from the White Lotus Association, you know."

name: Takuji
message: "Can't you just believe me and Mother after all this time? I'm sure that's what our father would've wanted too."

name: Tomosane
message: "D-Dad..."
I guess that really is what Dad would've wanted.
He wanted us to live together as a family, not keep on hating each other.
But...

name: Tomosane
message: "Anyway, if you do anything to Hasaki, I'll be coming after you. You'd better tell that woman, too."

name: Takuji
message: "You call her 'that woman'? You always say horrible things to Mother. Why don't you stop talking like that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No matter what you say to me, I won't forgive that woman."

name: Tomosane
message: "No matter what the reason was, the fact that she betrayed me and Dad won't change."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm, I haven't seen you in a while, and now I'm just disappointed, Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"

name: Takuji
message: "You're just a child. Everything you're saying is so immature."

name: Tomosane
message: "What did you call me, Takuji?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... Oh, right, I guess you've gotten pretty strong."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I have."

name: Takuji
message: "You were always pretty strong, but this time it won't go the same way."

name: Tomosane
message: "Quit bluffing. If you want to fight, then I'll take you on. Come at me already."

name: Takuji
message: "Heh, no thanks... I don't know what you're thinking. I'm no good at fighting."

name: Tomosane
message: "What was that?"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm not going to be a child forever. I'm not going to worry about things I can't beat you at, especially if they're worthless things."

name: Tomosane
message: "Worthless, huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, sorry, sorry. Don't misunderstand me. I'm just saying that I don't want to fight you, that's all."

name: Takuji
message: "I just don't want to fight someone I can't beat is all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Tch."
Takuji made that creepy laugh again.
Even though his face was laughing, his eyes looked completely different.
The anniversary ceremony ended before the sun went down.
I tried to help with the cleanup, but Yuki-nee stopped me.

name: Yuki
message: "Don't worry about that. The students from the dojo will take care of it. More importantly..."
Then Yuki-nee took my hand.
Hasaki was still holding onto my other hand.
The sun was already setting as the three of us hit the road.
As the curtain of night fell, Hasaki, Yuki-nee, and I walked up that same hill.

name: Yuki
message: "No matter how many times I see them, these sunflowers are really amazing."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, it's pretty impressive seeing so many of them together. It's actually kind of creepy in a way."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's not true. The sunflowers are really pretty."

name: Yuki
message: "Do you like sunflowers, Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah. What about you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Me, huh? Well, I guess I like them as much as most people."

name: Hasaki
message: "Well, I really like them a lot!"

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hey, don't run! You're gonna trip like last year!"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't worry so much. It's not like she can see all the sunflowers whenever she wants. Let her have some fun."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, that's true."

name: Yuki
message: "And Hasaki-chan has gotten a lot bigger since last year. She won't fall like she did before."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah."
Hasaki really had changed in the last year.
Her feet looked clumsy and unsure before, but now they nimbly danced over the soft earth.

name: Yuki
message: "What do you think about the sunflowers, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The sunflowers, huh? I looked them up in a book, and it said they were related to Chrysanthemums."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess they are."

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess that's why they look like 'em."

name: Yuki
message: "Look like what?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Like I said, like mums."

name: Yuki
message: "Really? Don't you think they're way too big?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, their size and shape is different, but sunflowers and mums still look pretty similar."

name: Yuki
message: "What's similar about them?"

name: Tomosane
message: "They're awfully gloomy."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess so."
Yuki-nee looked up at the sunflowers again, as if she was convinced by my answer.

name: Yuki
message: "You know how they say that blooming sunflowers turn to face the sun, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "If they turn to face the sun, doesn't that make them like a symbol of brightness?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Blooming sunflowers don't turn to face the sun."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. Sunflowers start to chase the sun before they bloom."

name: Tomosane
message: "Once they actually bloom, they stop chasing after the sun."

name: Yuki
message: "Wow. I didn't know that."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's another reason why they're just gloomy."

name: Yuki
message: "Why is that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, there probably aren't very many people who would say that sunflowers are gloomy."

name: Tomosane
message: "But to me, those flowers look like..."
To me...
They're like...

name: Tomosane
message: "They look like flowers for funerals."

name: Tomosane
message: "I probably got a strong first impression of sunflowers on that day. I still remember the time when I followed Hasaki up this hill."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. So the sunflowers on the hill look like flowers for the deceased."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. That's about right."
Once you wade through the sunflowers, you come upon a road shrouded in darkness.
Just like last year, it looked like the road to the underworld.
Last year, I didn't know this, but there are actually a lot of people who believe that road crosses over the border to the underworld.
I later realized that there are a lot of mentions of that road in old books in the village.
In reality, that road doesn't lead to the underworld at all.
Neither Hades nor Heaven, nor even a new world lies beyond that peak.
It's just another ordinary landscape on the other side.

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan, are you okay? It's a pretty steep hill."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, I-I'm okay."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't worry about it so much, Yuki-nee. She's walked up here before. You're the one who said Hasaki has gotten a lot bigger, after all."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, I'm okay. I'm bigger than I was back then."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, that's true. You've really grown up in the last year, Hasaki-chan."

name: Tomosane
message: "You can't really grow up in just one year, though."

name: Yuki
message: "You don't know what you're talking about. Hasaki has definitely grown up a lot."

name: Tomosane
message: "How exactly has she grown up?"

name: Yuki
message: "Let's see. She's taller, for example."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, I guess so, but she's still a little squirt."

name: Yuki
message: "Also, she doesn't call herself 'Hasaki' when she's speaking."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, that's right. Sometimes she called herself Hasaki instead of just saying 'I.' Why did that change?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Change? Did I really say that?"

name: Yuki
message: "You still say it sometimes, but not very much anymore."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, really? I didn't even realize."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, you don't always say it. You've definitely changed from the way you were last year.

name: Tomosane
message: "You sure are observant."

name: Yuki
message: "Of course I am. You've become awfully manly yourself."

name: Tomosane
message: "I was always a man."

name: Yuki
message: "No, I mean you've grown."

name: Tomosane
message: "Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "You guys are still young, so maybe you don't know."

name: Yuki
message: "That's pretty common, actually. Even if you don't notice yourself changing, you're still changing."

name: Yuki
message: "Take this creepy mountain road you thought you'd never climb, for instance. All of a sudden, you find yourself using it every day, just like that."

name: Yuki
message: "Time passes, and sometimes it's hard to tell whether it's you that's changing or the world around you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is it like that for you too?"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't ask me. What do you think? Have I changed?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You haven't changed much. Not at all, really."

name: Yuki
message: "I'll take your word for it."
We made our way through the darkness and came out on the same hilltop as before.
The stars shone in the clear sky.

name: Yuki
message: "The stars really are beautiful today."

name: Yuki
message: "It's a waning moon today."

name: Tomosane
message: "Waning?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it's a waning moon, but you can't see it yet."

name: Yuki
message: "There's no moonlight, so the stars are really bright."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's why the sky is so pretty!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Hasaki
message: "Can I go play?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, but don't go any further than this."

name: Hasaki
message: "Why not?"

name: Yuki
message: "There's a place where the hill turns into a steep cliff."

name: Hasaki
message: "A cliff?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, so don't walk over here."

name: Hasaki
message: "All right."

name: Yuki
message: "What about you, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What about me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Won't you play with us?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why?"

name: Yuki
message: "You want to play, don't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Not really. I'm not a kid."

name: Yuki
message: "You really are a kid..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmph. That's what you always say."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess so. That's why..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why what?"

name: Yuki
message: "You need to grow up already."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What's that mean? Are you treating me like a kid again?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, no, I'm just saying you ought to hurry up and become a real man."

name: Tomosane
message: "Come on, I am a real man."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez, do I have to spell it out for you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Sure, spell it out for me."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay, fine."

name: Yuki
message: "Tomosane, you ought to grow up and propose to me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Wh-What's that supposed to mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, you're blushing! Hahahaha."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What? Are you're teasing me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, you're blushing so much."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why, you―!"

name: Yuki
message: "S-Stop it! Whoa!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ow, ow, ow..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, now. You're a lot bigger than you used to be, so be careful. Hurry up, you're heavy."

name: Tomosane
message: "S-Sorry!"

name: Yuki
message: "Why are you blushing?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh... Whoa, my skirt!"

name: Yuki
message: "Did you look?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... Just for a second..."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmph!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah, wait, I'm sorry."

name: Yuki
message: "Heh...
Hahahahahaha!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, nothing. It's just that we're both old enough now that I have to care if you see my underwear."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "You don't understand? Well, that makes sense. It's just that before I never would've cared if you saw my underwear, because you were just some dumb kid."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha, but I'm getting red too. Why am I blushing?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why wouldn't you be?!"

name: Yuki
message: "I guess it's not that weird, yeah. Hahahaha..."
Yuki-nee kept on laughing loudly.
I didn't understand why she was laughing.
I wasn't entirely sure, but I felt like she wasn't making fun of me this time.

name: Yuki
message: "Still, though, the sky really is pretty. It's like the stars could coming raining down on top of us."

name: Tomosane
message: "But stars don't fall."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. The stars don't fall. The only thing that falls on Earth is light from distant stars and distant worlds."

name: Yuki
message: "The world is really interesting."

name: Tomosane
message: "How so?"

name: Yuki
message: "I mean, just look. We can see the light from worlds so far away."

name: Tomosane
message: "What's so strange about that?"

name: Yuki
message: "How wide are our brains?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's a poem. My favorite poem in the world."

name: Yuki
message: "The brain is wider than the sky."

name: Yuki
message: "For, put them side by side, the one the other will include..."

name: Yuki
message: "With ease, and you beside."

name: Yuki
message: "The brain is deeper than the sea."

name: Yuki
message: "For, hold them, blue to blue..."

name: Yuki
message: "The one the other will absorb..."

name: Yuki
message: "As sponges, buckets do."

name: Yuki
message: "The brain is just the weight of God."

name: Yuki
message: "For, lift them, pound for pound..."

name: Yuki
message: "And they will differ, if they do..."

name: Yuki
message: "As syllable from sound."

name: Tomosane
message: "As syllable... from sound..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yep."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's wrong."

name: Yuki
message: "Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "There is no God."

name: Yuki
message: "There's no God in the world. I see."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, there's no way he could exist."
If he existed, then why would he make our family be like this?
Why would he kill Dad?

name: Tomosane
message: "The person called God..."

name: Yuki
message: "He's not a person."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, anyway, even if he existed, he'd be weak and powerless. A worthless jerk."

name: Yuki
message: "A worthless jerk?"

name: Yuki
message: "Actually, speaking of that, I've thought about it too."

name: Yuki
message: "They say that God created the world in one week."

name: Yuki
message: "That's ridiculous."

name: Yuki
message: "If God really was the guy who created the world, he would say this."

name: Yuki
message: "'I shouldn't have made this.'"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't you think?"

name: Yuki
message: "'Wait, that part isn't done yet!'"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's what I think. No matter how many people are suffering on Earth, he just sits back and lives it up, like he doesn't give a shit."

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe. If God was anything like a real person, that's what I would say to him."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, he's really just scum."

name: Yuki
message: "He can do anything, and yet he doesn't act."

name: Yuki
message: "That said, have you ever heard this?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Heard what?"

name: Yuki
message: "Have you heard the story about the footprints in the sand?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What's that?"

name: Yuki
message: "God walks beside us in our lives. So when you die and look back at the path your life took, you will find another set of footprints next to your own."

name: Yuki
message: "A human life is supported by another power."

name: Yuki
message: "But then, in the lowest and saddest times of your life, you will find only one set of footprints."

name: Tomosane
message: "There's no one walking beside you in your saddest moments. That's when you need God the most, isn't it?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's not it."

name: Yuki
message: "In those moments, when you see only one set of footprints, that was when he carried you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Carried me?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Even when you think there's no way to keep going, you still move forward in life."

name: Yuki
message: "Just like when Hasaki-chan thought that there was no way she could ever climb that hill."

name: Yuki
message: "People always move forward. They can't stop in place."

name: Yuki
message: "There's one sentence inscribed in all our hearts."

name: Tomosane
message: "Inscribed in our hearts?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, a command that's inscribed in the heart of every person... No, a command inscribed in the heart of every living thing."

name: Tomosane
message: "In every living thing..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, and that inscription says just this."

name: Yuki
message: "Live happily!"

name: Yuki
message: "A cat. A dog. A zebra. A tiger. A cicada. And even a human."

name: Yuki
message: "Equally, they all must live happily!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "No animal lives without seeking happiness. They all live to seek their own happiness."

name: Yuki
message: "Because they are commanded to do so."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is that really a command?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who knows? But don't you think it is?"

name: Yuki
message: "And humans too... No, humans strive for happiness more than any other animal."

name: Yuki
message: "And then they despair."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why is that?"

name: Yuki
message: "You can't despair until you've hoped for happiness."

name: Yuki
message: "It's the same reason why animals don't experience despair."

name: Tomosane
message: "But animals try to live happily too, don't they?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then why don't animals experience despair?"

name: Yuki
message: "That should be obvious. Animals are living in happiness."

name: Tomosane
message: "What? There are some animals that aren't happy, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "There aren't. Animals are always happy."

name: Yuki
message: "All living beings are equally happy until the moment of their death."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why is that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who can say?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You don't know?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha. I actually do. The answer is simple."

name: Yuki
message: "They don't know death."

name: Yuki
message: "Animals are living through an eternal phase."

name: Yuki
message: "So animals who try to live happily are always happy."

name: Tomosane
message: "Animals don't know death?"

name: Yuki
message: "Isn't that obvious?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why not?"

name: Yuki
message: "Because in reality, no one knows what death is."

name: Tomosane
message: "No one?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, no one knows death. No one has ever experienced death."

name: Yuki
message: "Death can only be imagined. It's not something you can ever actually reach."

name: Yuki
message: "People don't know death. And yet they imagine death, and they can only drown in the midst of happiness because of it."

name: Yuki
message: "Despair is a privilege reserved for those who can drown even in the midst of happiness."

name: Tomosane
message: "A privilege? That sounds like a bad thing."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Still, that's how people found their words."

name: Yuki
message: "Because they felt that the sky was beautiful."

name: Yuki
message: "Because they prayed that the world could be better."

name: Yuki
message: "Words, beauty, and prayers."

name: Yuki
message: "They found their wonderful days along with those three powers."

name: Yuki
message: "People, find happiness!"

name: Yuki
message: "Do not drown in your happinesss. Do not despair of this world."

name: Yuki
message: "Just live happily. Something like that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Just live happily, huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I'm kind of making it sound dramatic."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha...
But it's really amazing, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "What is?"

name: Yuki
message: "I was just looking at the sky again. The stars really are amazing."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha..."
Yuki-nee stretched her arms out and laughed.

name: Yuki
message: "This entire sky... this entire universe is all in our heads. It's so, so amazing."

name: Tomosane
message: "All in our heads..."
When she told me that, I looked up at the sky once again.
This beautiful sky is in the world inside my head.
Of course, that makes perfect sense.
But once I arrived at that thought, my feelings changed to fear.
All of it is just my own world.
Anyone would be overwhelmed if they were faced with the realization that such an expansive, starry sky was all within their own head.

name: Yuki
message: "I thought of all that stuff just now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's what I thought when I looked up at the stars."

name: Yuki
message: "Of course, I always wondered about it. Just like you, Tomosane."

name: Yuki
message: "There is no God in the world."

name: Yuki
message: "Quite the opposite. Everything born into this world is under a sort of curse."

name: Yuki
message: "Because they all have to die."

name: Yuki
message: "All those happy times have to end."

name: Yuki
message: "All the joyful moments have to end."

name: Yuki
message: "No matter how much you might love someone. No matter how much you might love the world."

name: Yuki
message: "It will end."

name: Yuki
message: "It will all come to the end we call death."

name: Yuki
message: "That's why I think anyone born into this world is cursed."

name: Yuki
message: "Because happiness is just a warning of the end to come."

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe that's the reason why I saw the same dream over and over."

name: Tomosane
message: "The same dream?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. A dream about a baby."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're afraid of a baby in your dreams?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it's really scary. It's such a scary dream that I wake up crying."

name: Yuki
message: "There's a newborn baby. I don't know who the mother is."

name: Yuki
message: "No, maybe I'm the one who gave birth to this baby."

name: Yuki
message: "So I was happy."

name: Tomosane
message: "Happy?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I was really happy."

name: Yuki
message: "And then that baby cries. Wah, wah. Like that."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm happy, so I smile and laugh along with everyone else in the room."

name: Yuki
message: "That's a blessing on the baby."

name: Yuki
message: "A blessing on life."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm simply happy. I'm thankful that the baby made it safely into the world."

name: Yuki
message: "So the world is full of blessings on life."

name: Yuki
message: "But then... Then I realize."

name: Yuki
message: "'Oh, that's not quite right.'"

name: Yuki
message: "At that moment, I'm the only one who feels fear. I'm surrounded by smiling faces, and I'm the only one who feels fear."

name: Yuki
message: "Because I realize something. I realize that the child is cursing the world."

name: Yuki
message: "He's cursing the fact that he was born."

name: Yuki
message: "Everyone smiles, but I'm frozen in place. I'm alone in a world of blessings."

name: Yuki
message: "At that moment, I think to myself. I have to stop the baby's crying. I have to throttle that newborn infant. I have to end that life right here, right now."

name: Yuki
message: "Because being born is a curse."

name: Yuki
message: "At the very least, the newborn infant thinks that it's a curse."

name: Yuki
message: "So in order to end that cursed life, I have to..."

name: Yuki
message: "But of course, I can't do it."

name: Yuki
message: "I can't put my hands around the crying infant's neck and strangle him."

name: Yuki
message: "Why can't I do it? The baby can only curse life, but I can't put an end to that life."

name: Yuki
message: "I have to do it, but I can't."

name: Yuki
message: "And then I cry and cry. Even though no one would actually cry in that situation."

name: Yuki
message: "And soon, the baby's crying."

name: Yuki
message: "I realize the baby's crying."

name: Yuki
message: "I realize that his crying has calmed down."

name: Yuki
message: "And as I listen to him, I'm just thankful for it."

name: Yuki
message: "And then I pray for this happiness in his life."

name: Yuki
message: "Today, I finally realized what that dream means."

name: Tomosane
message: "Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, maybe you still don't understand."

name: Yuki
message: "But when I looked up at the stars, I found the answer."

name: Yuki
message: "Why you mustn't end a crying baby's life."

name: Yuki
message: "Why a person would mourn the death of another."

name: Yuki
message: "And why the grief they feel is certainly not misplaced."

name: Yuki
message: "One is right to pray in the darkness."

name: Yuki
message: "And to love the world."

name: Yuki
message: "The love that fills the world."

name: Yuki
message: "That love is prayer."

name: Yuki
message: "The blessing upon the sky that hangs over our heads."

name: Yuki
message: "That is prayer."

name: Yuki
message: "The world is filled with blessings."

name: Yuki
message: "That's why man is able to live in the eternal phase."

name: Yuki
message: "We can do it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee..."

name: Yuki
message: "It's so amazing! Confucius said that if he could learn the truth in the morning, he wouldn't mind dying in the evening of that same day."

name: Yuki
message: "Will I die now?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Did you learn the truth that Confucius was looking for?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not sure."
Yuki-nee laughed.
As if she was convinced that she really would die soon.
She blessed her final night.
It was several more minutes before I noticed something was strange.
I felt that there was someone behind me. Yuki and I both noticed it.

name: Yuki
message: "K-Kotomi-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why are you here?"

name: Kotomi
message: "Yuki-chan, you've grown so much. You were just a little girl before."

name: Kotomi
message: "You were about as big as Hasaki is now. You've really grown up."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, answer my question! Why are you here?!"

name: Yuki
message: "She must've followed us."

name: Kotomi
message: "No, not at all."

name: Yuki
message: "Then why are you here?"

name: Kotomi
message: "It was determined that it should be so."

name: Yuki
message: "Determined?"

name: Kotomi
message: "Yes. Everything is determined by prophecy."

name: Tomosane
message: "The prophecy? So you do still believe in that prophecy!"

name: Kotomi
message: "Prophecy? The law of pre-established harmony is far more than a simple prophecy. Though a bad boy like you wouldn't understand that, Tomosane."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What is this prophecy?"

name: Tomosane
message: "This woman thinks that the entire history leading up to the world's ultimate destruction has already been determined."

name: Yuki
message: "The world's... destruction."

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji said that you don't believe in that prophecy anymore!"

name: Kotomi
message: "Of course he did. He's a smart child. Unlike you, he isn't picky about how he accomplishes his goals."

name: Tomosane
message: "G-Goals?"

name: Yuki
message: "What goal are you talking about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You guys are still trying to kill Hasaki."

name: Yuki
message: "Kill Hasaki-chan?"

name: Kotomi
message: "Kill her? What are you talking about? We only want to return her to the place where she belongs."

name: Tomosane
message: "And you're still deluded as ever."

name: Hasaki
message: "Nooo!"

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hasaki?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hey! W-Wait, Tomosane."
I ran toward Hasaki's screaming voice.

name: Yuki
message: "T-Tomosane! There's a cliff there, so be careful! It's dark out!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki!"
I cursed my own decision.
I cursed the fact that I believed him for even a second...
They hadn't changed at all.
Takuji wanted to kill Hasaki and get back the power he thinks she stole from him.

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji, you bastard!"

name: Takuji
message: "You run as fast as ever, Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "You bastard. You told me you didn't believe in that crap anymore. Was that all a lie?"

name: Takuji
message: "I told you that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, you did! You said you weren't trying to get rid of Hasaki anymore!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I said that. What about it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then what's with that blade?"

name: Takuji
message: "This? It's just a knife."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you pointing it at Hasaki?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hasaki wouldn't listen to me, you know. I didn't want to do this either."

name: Tomosane
message: "Listen to you? What are you trying to make Hasaki do?"

name: Takuji
message: "Why are you so angry, Nii-san?"

name: Takuji
message: "This was inevitable."

name: Tomosane
message: "It wasn't inevitable! What're you trying to do?!"

name: Kotomi
message: "To return her to the sky."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"

name: Yuki
message: "K-Kotomi-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're still trying to do that?"

name: Kotomi
message: "Everything was determined in the moment that God created the world."

name: Kotomi
message: "It is pre-established harmony, determined in the moment of the world's genesis."

name: Tomosane
message: "What harmony?! If that prophecy was right, then your child with the pastor should've been a lone boy!"

name: Yuki
message: "With the pastor..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You've probably heard rumors about it before, Yuki-nee. Hasaki and Takuji don't have Mamiya blood in their veins."

name: Tomosane
message: "The blood in their veins came from the pastor of the White Lotus Association."

name: Tomosane
message: "You betrayed my dad, you bitch! You had a child with some religious fraud!"

name: Tomosane
message: "And you told that child that he was going to become the savior and save the world from destruction!"

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. I was supposed to be born as the savior."

name: Takuji
message: "I was supposed to be the savior, born from the union of the White Lotus Association founder's blood and the blood of the long line of shrine maidens in the Sanami family!"

name: Tomosane
message: "But that's not what happened! The reality is that you aren't any kind of savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "No! That's because the heritage was split between two children rather than just one!"

name: Yuki
message: "Th-That's..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right, Yuki-nee. They believe that Takuji couldn't become the savior because Hasaki was born."

name: Takuji
message: "It's not a belief, it's a clear and evident truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "The prophesied birth of a savior when these two powerful bloodlines come together... She prevented the fulfillment of that prophecy."

name: Takuji
message: "The soul which should have been one was instead split in two."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not true! You aren't the savior! The only reason you were abandoned by the pastor is because he got bored of you."

name: Tomosane
message: "He just made up all that crap about the savior!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Our father investigated all of that before he died! The pastor told that crap to every woman he took advantage of!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hmph. What would journalists know anyway? They're just peasants, people of low birth. They can only examine things from the outside."

name: Tomosane
message: "But Dad only became a journalist to investigate those lies!"

name: Tomosane
message: "So that you would know the truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "What truth is that? There is only one truth."

name: Takuji
message: "The world will end. And before that day comes, I must come into my power as the savior on Earth."

name: Tomosane
message: "That day will never come! You're just a commoner! You'd be normal whether Hasaki was born or not!"

name: Takuji
message: "How dare you call me a commoner?! Maybe you were the best at all those things in the past, but now I've far surpassed you!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then put down that knife and face me. If you're a man, then put your fists up and fight me!"

name: Kotomi
message: "You don't have to listen to him, Takuji."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up!"

name: Kotomi
message: "Tomosane has Sanami and Mamiya blood in him. Of course, he's not an ordinary person either."

name: Kotomi
message: "But that only means that he is a hurdle for you to overcome as you follow your destiny and become the savior."

name: Kotomi
message: "It's okay if you can't beat him right now. Takuji, you will eventually be the person to save the entire world."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's bullshit!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't bring Hasaki into your delusional fantasies! Keep that crap to yourself!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Give Hasaki back!"

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... You really aren't good at making reasoned arguments."

name: Kotomi
message: "You shouldn't listen to the words of the ignorant, Takuji."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, I know. Hasaki is part of me to begin with. I need only to return her to the sky and regain the power that is rightfully mine."

name: Kotomi
message: "That's right. Everything will be saved once you do. Now, Takuji, return Hasaki's soul to the sky."

name: Kotomi
message: "Once you do, the lost part of your soul will return to you."

name: Takuji
message: "Once I do..."

name: "I will become the savior."
message: Takuji

name: "Takuji will become the savior."
message: Kotomi

name: Takuji+Kotomi
message: "I will become the savior."

name: Takuji+Kotomi
message: "Takuji will become the savior."
"That's ridiculous!"
I wasn't certain what to do.
Perhaps what I did in that moment was reckless.
I instantly leaped forward.
Right into Takuji.
But Yuki-nee ran in a different direction than I did.

name: Takuji
message: "Ah!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?!"
An instant.
Such a short amount of time that it would be called a mere instant.
He threw Hasaki over the cliff.
Hasaki's small body flew over the edge with surprising speed.
I panicked and ran toward the cliff.
But I couldn't pull her back from over the edge.
I lost my balance and fell.
My eyes could only follow her over the edge.
I followed her falling body.
It floated in midair.
Then gravity took over, and she was sucked down into the abyss.
It felt like my words were too late.
My legs were too slow.
I could only lament the fact that I was powerless.
And then I saw something unbelievable happen right before my eyes.
Yuki-nee caught Hasaki in midair as she fell off the cliff.
She didn't reach out with her hand and grab her.
Yuki-nee threw her entire body over the edge and caught Hasaki.
I saw that happen in a flash. In a mere instant.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasakiii! Yuki-neee!"
Both of them disappeared, sucked down into the darkness lying under the cliff's edge.
Then came a sound I never wanted to hear.
A sound that grates on the ears.
An unimaginable, unpleasant sound.
Simply a sound no one would want to hear.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasakiii! Yuki-neeee!"

name: Takuji
message: "Heh, hehehe... Hahahahaha!"

name: Takuji
message: "I did it. I did it... I finally did it."

name: Takuji
message: "That man pretending to be my father always got in my way before."

name: Takuji
message: "The power I deserved to have is finally coming back to me. The part of my power which was given to Hasaki has finally returned to the sky."

name: Kotomi
message: "You did a good job."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I did it, Mother! I can finally be the savior."

name: Tomosane
message: "The hell are you saying..."

name: Takuji
message: "Now I can save the world."

name: Takuji
message: "I can return the world to the sky."

name: Tomosane
message: "You fucking idiot..."

name: Kotomi
message: "Now the pre-established harmony can unfold in the way God intended. Everything will proceed according to the prophecy."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's bullshit!"

name: Takuji
message: "Nii-san."

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... Maybe you don't understand this because you're just a commoner, but this isn't something to grieve over."

name: Takuji
message: "It's not like I killed Hasaki. I merely returned her to the sky."

name: Kotomi
message: "Yes. I saw her when she ascended into the sky."

name: Tomosane
message: "How stupid are you?!"
"Aaah... Uwah..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? That voice..."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Kotomi
message: "Wha-!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki! Hasaki, is that you?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san... Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki, are you okay?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, I'm okay, but... But..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What's wrong?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san... Yuki-san is... There's a bunch of blood, and she's not moving..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What happened to Yuki-nee?"

name: Hasaki
message: "She was protecting me... She was just protecting me..."

name: Hasaki
message: "She held onto me the entire time, all the way until the end... Until we fell down here..."

name: Hasaki
message: "She hit the cliff over and over, but she... Yuki-san, Yuki-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't move!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm coming!"

name: Takuji
message: "Th-That girl..."

name: Kotomi
message: "Takuji! You have to do it now! Return Hasaki to the sky before the waning moon rises! Before Tomosane gets to her!"

name: Takuji
message: "Y-Yes!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I won't let you!"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?!"

name: Takuji
message: "Gah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I won't let you! I won't let you! I won't let you!"

name: Takuji
message: "Ugh, ah, ugh..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What did you do to Yuki-nee... I won't let you kill Hasaki too!"

name: Takuji
message: "D-Damn it!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Agh!"

name: Takuji
message: "Haa, haa... Wow, I can't believe you dodged that."

name: Tomosane
message: "You bastard..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm going to end it here, Takuji."

name: Takuji
message: "End it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I won't hesitate any longer. Until I defeat you utterly and absolutely, you won't give up on those delusions."

name: Tomosane
message: "I will defeat you, right here, once and for all."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... With your bare hands? I have a knife, in case you forgot."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's a perfect handicap to make this fair. That's no problem at all."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmph, I really wonder where that confidence comes from."

name: Tomosane
message: "Unlike you, I've been practicing every day."

name: Takuji
message: "What? You act like you're the only one who's been working hard."

name: Takuji
message: "In the past few years since you disappeared, I've worked myself to death."

name: Takuji
message: "In order to surpass you, in order to make it clear to you that you are nothing more than a hurdle for me to overcome."

name: Tomosane
message: "And this is the result of all your hard work?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, exactly. But we aren't done yet. I'll return you to the sky, and then Hasaki will follow suit."

name: Takuji
message: "And then I will become the savior."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, you won't!"

name: Takuji
message: "I will! I'm different from you! I am the chosen one!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What's different?! You're just some bastard that was born when some other man played around with your mom!"

name: Takuji
message: "Don't say that!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ugh!"
My cheek burned.
When I touched it, I could feel that it'd been split open.
It wasn't near a fatal wound, though.
I took my stance to defend myself against the next attack.
But...

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What is this..."

name: Takuji
message: "What is this?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "T-Takuji..."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-Whoa. Stop screwing around. What's happening?"
I didn't have a clue what was happening either.
The simple reality was that the knife previously in Takuji's hand was now plunged deep into his chest.

name: Tomosane
message: "T-Takuji, you..."

name: Takuji
message: "What's happening? I was supposed to become the savior and save the world..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji!"
I tried to pull the knife out of him.

name: Kotomi
message: "S-Stop!"
I heard someone behind me, telling me to stop, but that didn't make me hesitate for even a moment.
I pulled the knife out of Takuji's chest.
I knew right away that I had done the worst thing possible in that situation.
No, either way, such a deep wound out in the mountains would inevitably be fatal.
But if I hadn't pulled the knife out, he would've had more time to live.
But I did it... I pulled it out.

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What? What's happening... Suddenly... everything's going white..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji! Hold yourself together!"

name: Takuji
message: "What? Nii-san... You ran away into the white... That's a dirty trick..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji! Hey!"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh? That's weird... Why won't my body move... all of a sudden?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hold on! Don't leave me now!"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh? What are you doing, Nii-san?"

name: Takuji
message: "Did I... lose... Have I lost?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Who cares about losing?! Takuji! Hold on, please!"

name: Takuji
message: "I see... I lost... That's why my body is getting cold... I can't move..."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... But I won't die... I'll never die..."

name: Takuji
message: "Because my mother comes from a long line of shrine maidens capable of raising the dead... So I'll come back..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, I'll absolutely... never die..."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll survive...  no matter what it takes..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I understand. Anyway, just don't go to sleep!"
I tore off my own shirt and tried to wrap it around Takuji's chest.
But the flow of blood didn't slow down at all.

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji! Hold on, please!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm... going to be... fine... Don't worry..."

name: Takuji
message: "Nothing... to worry... about..."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll... never die..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, you won't die! You're going to be fine!"

name: Takuji
message: "That's... right..."

name: Takuji
message: "Even if... my body... breaks..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji."

name: Takuji
message: "I can just use yours, Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wha-!"

name: Tomosane
message: "T-Takuji..."

name: Takuji
message: "I won't die... I won't..."
Takuji's fingers pressed into my temple like nails.
It was beyond mere pain.
H-How can he be... so strong...

name: Kotomi
message: "Destroy him, just like that."

name: Tomosane
message: "D-Destroy?"

name: Kotomi
message: "Yes. Takuji, you can do it. Destroy his brain. Do it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Guh, guhaaa."
His eyes narrowed to slits as he stared into mine.

name: Takuji
message: "I will... take your brain..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Guh... Ghaa..."
I couldn't tell what was real and what wasn't.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah, ahghaa..."
Takuji's fingertips broke through my skull.
That's impossible. A human doesn't have nearly enough strength to break a person's skull like that.
This must be an illusion. This can't be reality.
As a trained fighter, I knew that better than anyone.
The fact that it was impossible.
And yet...
My consciousness started to waver.
I couldn't hold myself in this world.

name: Takuji
message: "I'll take your body... Tomosane Nii-san..."

name: Takuji
message: "So I guess this is..."

name: Takuji
message: "FAREWELL."
